Name: Week 0 - Discovery Review
Description: Discovery Review with Josh and Janet on Tuesday March 17. Walked through JobTread System Diagnostic findings, gap analysis, and workflow map. Aligned on implementation priorities.

Name: Workflow Setup - Change Orders
Description: First weekly working session with Josh and Janet. Change order workflow surfaced (Janet sent over examples from TL 123 Sgro job).

Name: Document Templates & Dashboard Intro
Description: Covered change orders, document templates, and early dashboard conversation. Josh agreed to send branded docs/color selection sheet.

Name: Budget Formulas & Success Champion Launch
Description: Budget formulas discussion. Josh to build the cost sheet identifying assemblies, ranges, and mental-math items. Janet received the Success Champion Playbook. Planned full team (Matt, Mike, Jeff) joining next session.

Name: Full Team Onboarding - Schedule Deep Dive
Description: First full-team session — met Matt, Mike, Jeff. Reviewed dashboard tiles, selections, and budget progress. Spent significant time on construction schedule; identified dependency gaps and ordering issues. Josh to deliver KPI list, updated budget with SF formulas, and allowance list.

Name: Budget Template Finalization
Description: Matt and Mike joined at the start. Covered decisions landed and action items grouped by person. Budget template corrections finalized and safe to use. Matt and Mike flagged for Loom walkthroughs on two schedules.
